title: Resolve Heltec Vision Master E213 bridge mapping
description: The heltec_vision_master_e213 bridge fragment has no canonical Zephyr target. Validate a real board definition and wiring or explicitly retire it.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical target builds and reaches bridge runtime oracle, or approved retirement removes fragment and support claims.
notes: Resolution complete: bridge fragment marked STALE/RETIRED with consistent comments matching peer sub-beads (e290 etc.); docs updated to list it explicitly. See commit 1d645de52 which incorporated the fix.
